title: AuthorityRecord
description: A record of authority granted to the actor for this run.

authority_id.description: Unique identifier for this authority record.

run_id.description: The run this authority record applies to.

actor.description: The agent or principal that holds this authority.

scope.description: The list of permissions or capabilities covered by this authority.

source.description: Where the authority originated (e.g. user delegation, system policy).

expires_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp when this authority expires.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the authority was granted.
